## Justification
Why do we need this cherry-pick in the local-first fork?

## Testing
How did you test this change? What automated tests did you add? If you didn't add any new tests, what's your justification for not adding any?

## Validation
- [ ] I validated the local-first behavior that motivated this cherry-pick
- [ ] I checked that this does not reintroduce hosted Warp services, telemetry upload, billing, or login gates
